recommendations.title: Bambi
recommendations.overview: Bambi's tale unfolds from season to season as the young prince of the forest learns about life, love, and friends.

recommendations.title: Rabbit Fire
recommendations.overview: Daffy Duck and Bugs argue back and forth whether it is duck season or rabbit season. The object of their arguments is hunter Elmer Fudd.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Reluctant Werewolf
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Shaggy is turned into a werewolf, and it's up to Scooby, Scrappy and Shaggy's girlfriend to help him win a race against other monsters, and become human again.

recommendations.title: Wolf Children
recommendations.overview: After her werewolf lover unexpectedly dies in an accident, a woman must find a way to raise the son and daughter that she had with him. However, their inheritance of their father's traits prove to be a challenge for her.

recommendations.title: In Your Dreams
recommendations.overview: Stevie and her little brother Elliot journey into the wildly absurd landscape of their own dreams to ask the Sandman to grant them the perfect family.

recommendations.title: Animals United

recommendations.title: The Book of Life

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Hoppers
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, Comedy, Adventure
